patches.description:
攔截 Gboard 的簽章白名單檢查並強制通過
Bypass Gboard signature whitelist checks and force them to pass.
patches.name: Add Gboard Signature Bypass

patches.description:
啟用 AI 撰寫工具，支援所有語言
Enable AI writing tools with support for all languages.
patches.name: AI Writing Tools

patches.description:
強制啟用中文語音
Force-enable Chinese voice input.
patches.name: Chinese Online Voice Input

patches.description:
增強剪貼簿的保留時間、數量上限、預覽行數、倒數/建立時間、順序編號與欄數
Enhance clipboard retention time, item count limit, preview lines, countdown/creation time labels, order index, and column count.
patches.name: Clipboard Enhancements

patches.description:
啟用 剪貼簿 > 顯示從最近複製文字中攝取的資訊，例如地址、電話號碼和其他項目
Enable Clipboard > Show addresses, phone numbers, and other items pulled from recently copied text.
patches.name: Clipboard Entity Extraction

patches.description:
長按 剪貼簿 顯示編輯
Enable Edit when long-pressing a clipboard item.
patches.name: Clipboard Item Edit

patches.description:
新增獨立的特殊符號分頁，長按逗號->愛心
Add a dedicated custom symbols tab and replace the long-press comma entry with a heart shortcut.
patches.name: Custom Symbols

patches.description:
自訂 Gboard「Emojis, stickers & GIFs」底部 tabs 的排序，支援拖曳調整
Customize the bottom tab order in Gboard's Emojis, stickers & GIFs panel with drag-and-drop reordering.
patches.name: Emojis, stickers & GIFs Tab Order

patches.description: 啟用內嵌自動填入建議 / Enable Inline Autofill Suggestions
patches.name: Enable Inline Autofill Suggestions

patches.description:
啟用 Undo/Redo 功能
Enable the Undo/Redo feature.
patches.name: Enable Undo/Redo feature

patches.description:
英文 QWERTY 鍵盤上滑大小寫
Flick up on the English QWERTY keyboard to toggle uppercase and lowercase.
patches.name: English QWERTY Up-Flick Uppercase

patches.description:
啟用 修正和建議 > 文法檢查
Enable Text correction > Grammar check.
patches.name: Grammar Checker

patches.description:
啟用 修正和建議 > 智慧撰寫
Enable Text correction > Smart Compose.
patches.name: Inline Suggestions

patches.description:
啟用圓角按鍵，主題詳情 > 按鍵形狀
Enable Key shape in Theme details.
patches.name: Key Shape Selection

patches.description:
新增英文鍵盤地球鍵忽略時間覆寫，可獨立控制輸入後切語言延遲
Add an independent English globe key ignore interval override for post-typing language-switch delay.
patches.name: Latin Globe Key Ignore Interval

patches.description:
將套件名稱改成 dev.jason.com.google.android.inputmethod.latin 以便共存安裝
Rename the package to dev.jason.com.google.android.inputmethod.latin so it can be installed alongside the official Gboard.
patches.name: Package Rename

patches.description:
允許切換新版或舊版 Gboard 設定頁面
Allow switching between the new and legacy Gboard settings pages.
patches.name: Settings Homepage Override

patches.description:
滑動鍵盤第一排，在原生列與可自訂文字/JavaScript 列之間切換
Swipe the keyboard top row to switch between the stock row and a customizable text/JavaScript row.
patches.name: Swipeable Custom Top Row

patches.description:
新增手機自架的 Web Clipboard，支援瀏覽器同步、配對碼與快速設定開關
Add the phone-hosted Web Clipboard with browser sync, pairing, and a Quick Settings Tile.
patches.name: Web Clipboard

patches.description:
調整注音鍵盤底排按鍵大小
Adjust Zhuyin keyboard bottom-row key sizes.
patches.name: Zhuyin Bottom Row Key Sizes

patches.description:
注音 ㄥ 上滑快速切換繁簡
Swipe up on Zhuyin ㄥ to quickly toggle Traditional and Simplified Chinese.
patches.name: Zhuyin Quick Traditional/Simplified Toggle

patches.description:
注音鍵盤支持上下滑輸入
Enable slide-up and slide-down input on the Zhuyin keyboard.
patches.name: Zhuyin Slide Input
